# 5 Free Ways to Support GrowWeedEasy.com
GrowWeedEasy.com is run by two growers, Nebula Haze and Sirius Fourside. [Learn more about us here](https://www.growweedeasy.com/about). If you enjoy our weed growing tutorials and want to help contribute to the growth of GrowWeedEasy.com, here are 5 easy ways you can help:
## #1 – Spread the Word
If you have a friend who’s growing weed, let them in on our secret! We love to help more growers perfect their craft and get the best results possible.
Free resources for cannabis growers of all skill levels:
  * Browse GrowWeedEasy.com (use the search bar to find articles about new topics)
  * [Diagnose your sick plant with the free Plant Doctor](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-symptoms-pictures).
  * [Join our free grow community](https://forum.growweedeasy.com/) and talk with other growers.
  * [Sign up for our weekly newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news) to get a tutorial delivered every Sunday.

[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/runtz-bud-just-before-harvest-natural-tent.jpg)
## #2 – Share Your Journey
Some of the most valuable knowledge we’ve gained has come from growers like you sharing their experiences. And seeing your progress is thrilling. [Send us pictures](https://www.growweedeasy.com/submit-trophy-pics) of your plants, tell us what you think about any specific topic, or share your personal cannabis growing stories. If you have important information to share with the growing world, we want to help you. Your insights enrich our community!
We can’t always respond, but we read every email we receive.
## #3 – Contribute to Our Content
Your feedback is priceless because you’re the reason we’re here. [Let us know](https://www.growweedeasy.com/website-feedback) if you spot typos or inaccuracies, have ideas for new topics, or see a gap in our content that needs filling. We love running experiments, doing tests, trying out new grow methods, etc. The more eyes and ears contributing insights, the faster we can create the content you’re looking for.
## #4 – Keep Growing
Continue growing weed, and let it flourish. The world is a better place when everyone who needs weed has access to it. Every new grower contributes to the broader knowledge base, lifting the whole community. The more passionate growers in the world, the better!
## #5 – Support Us Through Amazon
Click on [Amazon links](https://www.amazon.com?&linkCode=ll2&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=bc338a4c8862f478078c11d2df6aa60b&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) on our website when you see something you want to buy. When you make a purchase, we earn a commission as part of the Amazon Associates program. This is at no extra cost to you. As an Amazon Associate, we earn from qualifying purchases.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2015/11/chalkboard-cannabis-leaf.jpg)
[Check out more cannabis growing tutorials!](https://www.growweedeasy.com/link-guide-growing-cannabis)

GrowWeedEasy.com was [founded in 2010](https://www.growweedeasy.com/about) by Nebula Haze and Sirius Fourside. Featured in _High Times_ , Ed Rosenthal’s books, _Cannabis Business Times_ , and _Skunk Magazine_ , GrowWeedEasy.com is the **#1 free resource in the world** for learning how to grow cannabis at home. Our simple step-by-step tutorials make it easy for anyone to grow great weed. **[Sign up for our free newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news)** to get grow tips delivered every Sunday at 4:20 AM.
